things.name: City of Arts and Sciences
things.description: Santiago Calatrava's futuristic complex with opera house, science museum and oceanarium

things.name: Valencia Cathedral
things.description: Gothic cathedral claiming to house the Holy Grail in the Capilla del Santo Caliz

things.name: La Lonja de la Seda
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage late-Gothic silk exchange, a masterpiece of civil architecture

things.name: Central Market
things.description: Europe's largest fresh produce market under a modernist tile and ironwork dome

things.name: Turia Gardens
things.description: 9km linear park in the former river bed with sports facilities and children's attractions

things.name: Malvarrosa Beach
things.description: Fine sandy beach with promenade restaurants specialising in authentic Valencian paella

things.name: Barrio del Carmen
things.description: Historic bohemian quarter with Roman walls, medieval towers and vibrant nightlife

things.name: Bioparc Valencia
things.description: Innovative zoo recreating African ecosystems with immersive animal encounters

things.name: Albufera Natural Park
things.description: Lagoon and rice paddies where Valencian paella was invented, just 10km from the city

things.name: IVAM
things.description: Institut Valencia d'Art Modern, the region's leading contemporary art museum
